globalProperty.description: Spring bean name of the active EmbeddingProvider. Modules may register additional EmbeddingProvider beans, but selecting which is active is a deployment decision. See ADR Decision 8.

Path (relative to the OpenMRS application data directory) to the ONNX model file used by the default embedding provider. Required when the ONNX provider is active. The model must be multilingual per ADR Decision 8.
Optional path to a separate query-encoder ONNX model. Set only for dual-encoder models such as MedCPT; leave empty for single-encoder models.
Path (relative to the OpenMRS application data directory) to the WordPiece vocabulary file (vocab.txt) for the configured ONNX model.
Maximum number of tokens passed to the embedding model. Inputs beyond this length are silently truncated; the chunking layer above the tokenizer is the right place to redesign that behavior.
